summary: Iteration 3 - auth + admin dashboard + WhatsApp + mobile. Backend: 23/23 pytest cases passing (auth login/me, profil update with whatsapp persistence, full CRUD lifecycles for pengurus/berita/galeri, pengaduan public-create + admin list/status/delete, all admin endpoints correctly return 401 without bearer token). Frontend: home page has no sejarah card, floating WA + Kontak WA buttons present with correct wa.me hrefs, /login flow redirects to /admin, all 6 admin tabs render, Pengurus add works, Statistik save shows toast, Berita add works, Pengaduan status dropdown updates with success toast, logout clears localStorage rt_token and redirects to /login, /admin without token redirects to /login, mobile (390x844) hamburger toggle opens menu, no horizontal overflow, floating WA still visible.
action_items: Add data-testid to row-level edit/delete buttons in PengurusPanel/BeritaPanel/GaleriPanel (e.g. pengurus-edit-{id}, pengurus-delete-{id}). Currently only pengurus-row-{id} wrapper has a testid; the action buttons inside are not addressable from tests, blocking automated edit/delete coverage.

Add data-testid to admin form inputs (pengurus-form-nama/jabatan/inisial/urutan, berita-form-judul/ringkasan/konten/kategori/tanggal/gambar, galeri-form-*). Currently tests have to rely on positional querySelectorAll which is brittle.
critical_code_review_comments: Row-level action buttons (Edit/Hapus) in PengurusPanel.jsx, BeritaPanel.jsx, GaleriPanel.jsx lack data-testid attributes. Per project testability guidelines, all interactive elements (buttons, links) must have data-testid. Suggest adding `pengurus-edit-{id}` and `pengurus-delete-{id}` on the action <button> elements (and equivalent for berita/galeri).

Admin form input fields lack data-testid. Tests fall back to positional input[n] selectors which break if column order changes. Add data-testid on each Input/Textarea/Select inside pengurus-form, berita-form, galeri-form.

Pengaduan delete uses native window.confirm (inferred from page.on('dialog') need). Consider replacing with shadcn AlertDialog for consistency with the rest of the UI and to enable better automated testing.
ProfilModel uses extra='ignore', so a frontend that still posts legacy 'sejarah' field will silently be dropped — fine for migration but worth a server log warn during transition.

/api/auth/login does not implement brute-force lockout. Per playbook (auth_testing.md) recommend tracking failed attempts and locking after 5 fails. Currently any number of wrong-password attempts is allowed.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (rewritten to cover auth + admin CRUD + pengaduan lifecycle, removed obsolete sejarah and unauth pengaduan-list assertions)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: TEST_UI Pengurus (still present after edit step — see context), TEST_UI Berita (still in DB), TEST_ pengaduan entries from pytest are cleaned up by the lifecycle test. UI test left behind 1 pengurus row (TEST_UI Edited) and 1 berita row (TEST_UI Berita) — main agent may want to clean these from MongoDB or leave for visual verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified via pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Frontend admin uses Bearer token from localStorage key 'rt_token'. All 6 admin tabs have data-testid='admin-tab-{profil|pengurus|statistik|berita|galeri|pengaduan}'. Form-level testids exist (pengurus-form, pengurus-add, pengurus-save) but row-action and input-field testids are missing — see action_items. Pengaduan status select element has data-testid='pengaduan-status-{id}'. Floating WA href format: https://wa.me/{whatsapp}?text=...
rca of the issue: N/A - no functional bugs found. Only testability gaps (missing data-testid on row-actions and form inputs) reported as action items.
